mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO xm_session_artifact ( id, tenant_id, session_type, session_ref_id, artifact_type, anchor_type, anchor_key, sequence_no, title, summary, object_key, payload_ref, metadata_json, occurred_at, create_time, update_time, del_flag ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, '000000', #{item.sessionType}, #{item.sessionRefId}, #{item.artifactType}, #{item.anchorType}, #{item.anchorKey}, #{item.sequenceNo}, #{item.title}, #{item.summary}, #{item.objectKey}, #{item.payloadRef}, #{item.metadataJson}, #{item.occurredAt}, #{item.occurredAt}, #{item.occurredAt}, '0' )
